# Ahrefs setup for Codex

The `$seo-ahrefs` skill is already installed. Configure the optional MCP server using the Ahrefs command in [the central Codex integration guide](../../../CODEX_INTEGRATIONS.md).

Before a live call, confirm the `ahrefs` server appears in `codex mcp list` and that Ahrefs tools are visible in the current Codex session. Ahrefs usage may be metered; estimate and approve large batches before execution.
